$comment: Schema pin declaration for state/quality/** and state/quality-snapshots/** artifacts in ix. Phase 0 deliverable #5 of ga/docs/plans/2026-05-14-arch-cherny-adoption-and-tribunal-ci-plan-v2.md.

policy.scope: Quality artifacts produced AFTER this file's git introduction are considered pinned to these versions. Dated daily snapshots under state/quality-snapshots/ pre-dating this file are implicitly draft/v0.
policy.bump_rule: On OPTIC-K version bump (e.g. v1.8 -> v1.9), this file MUST be updated before consumers (ga RAG layer, Demerzel tribunal) re-tune against new artifacts. Cascade invalidation via per-domain .lock + manual rebaselining.
